title: Startup ElevenLabs Aims to Be IPO-Ready Within Three Years
description: AI voice startup ElevenLabs plans to be ready for an initial public offering in two to three years, according to Chief Executive Officer Mati Staniszewski, potentially making it one of the first artificial intelligence companies started in Europe to prepare for an IPO.

title: Meta, Google Pivot in Addiction Trial to Accuser’s History
description: As Meta Platforms Inc. and Google start presenting their defense in a landmark trial over social media addiction, the companies are pushing back on claims by the 20-year-old who brought the case that they’re solely to blame for her mental health struggles.

title: HPE Projects Sales That Top Estimates on AI Hardware Demand
description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. gave an outlook for revenue in the current quarter that exceeded analysts’ estimates, a sign the company is benefiting from solid demand for hardware that helps customers run AI workloads.
